Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Wandering Titan]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Skysworn ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 18''' — The Wandering Titan is a creature in a chasm on the ocean's floor that rolls its stone joints.}}

== Uncrowned ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 10''' — The Wandering Titan is an image of a turtle-shelled armored warrior.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 15''' — The Wandering Titan was attacked by twelve Monarchs during the Dread War.}}

== Wintersteel ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 2''' — The awakening of the Wandering Titan is a significant upcoming event.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 2''' — The Wandering Titan is expected to rise in less than three months.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 3''' — There has been buzz about the Wandering Titan stirring.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 5''' — The Wandering Titan has moved to the edge of Akura territory.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 7''' — The Wandering Titan is a location where an Akura operation is occurring.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 9''' — The Wandering Titan is a location.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 9''' — The Wandering Titan is a Dreadgod whose shell has become a hill rising from the water.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 9''' — The Wandering Titan is a Dreadgod that has reached up to the land with one arm.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 9''' — The Wandering Titan is often depicted as a turtle that walks like a man.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 9''' — The Wandering Titan feeds on powerful materials and minerals.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 12''' — The Wandering Titan is a threat that people must be evacuated from before it wakes.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 13''' — Dreadgod cults may be a danger to survivors of the Wandering Titan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 14''' — The Wandering Titan is a yellow image associated with the Dreadgod's will.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 15''' — The Wandering Titan is a model for the Path used by Abyssal Palace members.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 21''' — The bear dreadbeast inherited power from the Wandering Titan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 23''' — The Wandering Titan is a being from which madra can be drained.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 24''' — The Wandering Titan is a being that will eventually awaken.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 27''' — Brother Aekin took on the aspect of the Wandering Titan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 28''' — The Wandering Titan was waking early.}}

== Bloodline ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 2''' — The Wandering Titan is a threat.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 2''' — The Wandering Titan is a threat that cloudship crews are ordered to flee from.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 4''' — The Wandering Titan is known for its inevitability.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 4''' — The Wandering Titan is a humanoid giant of dark stone that kneels at the edge of the ocean.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 4''' — The Wandering Titan has a turtle's shell rising behind its shoulders.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 4''' — The Wandering Titan's presence dominates the earth aura for hundreds of miles.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 4''' — The Wandering Titan uses a hunger technique to consume power and physical materials.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 4''' — The Wandering Titan has a tail resembling a monkey's tail.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 4''' — The Wandering Titan cycled its madra for a brief instant.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 6''' — The Wandering Titan is one of the four Dreadgods depicted in a mural.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 10''' — The Wandering Titan is a source of chaos and Dreadgod influence.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 10''' — The Wandering Titan is expected to arrive in one week.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 12''' — The Wandering Titan is approaching.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 12''' — The Wandering Titan's power was waxing like a rising sun.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 13''' — The Wandering Titan crashed through a mountain.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 14''' — Yerin wants Northstrider to keep the Wandering Titan away.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 15''' — The Wandering Titan is a massive entity that can roar.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 15''' — The Wandering Titan roared after an arrow struck.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 16''' — The Wandering Titan is a threat that Malice would drive off.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 16''' — The Wandering Titan has rocky skin.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 17''' — The Wandering Titan cut a swath of devastation across the landscape.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 17''' — The Kazan clan traveled during a fight between the Wandering Titan and a Monarch.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 17''' — The Wandering Titan is a massive entity that can break portals.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 17''' — The Wandering Titan turned back toward Sacred Valley.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 18''' — The Wandering Titan has arrived at Sacred Valley.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 18''' — The Wandering Titan is a challenge Lindon faces.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 18''' — The Wandering Titan is a force of nature comparable to a thunderbolt or an aura-storm.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 19''' — The Wandering Titan began drawing its hand back for a swipe.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 19''' — Ziel's group is fighting the Wandering Titan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 19''' — The Wandering Titan's foot is covering the sky from Yerin's perspective.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 22''' — The Wandering Titan was searching for the source of hunger madra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 22''' — Lindon's appetites from the Wandering Titan made him long to consume a mummified hand.}}

== Reaper ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 2''' — Lindon and his team previously fought the Wandering Titan at its weakest.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 4''' — The town of Refuge was attacked by the Wandering Titan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 4''' — The Wandering Titan shattered Mercy's bloodline armor.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 7''' — Lindon consumed energy from the Wandering Titan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 8''' — The Wandering Titan annihilated the guardian spirit of the chamber.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 10''' — The war-bands of the Eight-Man Empire sound like the footsteps of the Wandering Titan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 12''' — The Wandering Titan's attacks can be casual.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 20''' — The Wandering Titan is capable of causing earthquakes.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 24''' — The Wandering Titan experiences hunger that always returns.}}

== Dreadgod ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 3''' — The Wandering Titan was weakened by a suppression field.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 4''' — The Wandering Titan remains on Ashwind.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 5''' — The Wandering Titan possesses chaotic golden madra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 6''' — Northstrider was seen in battle with the Wandering Titan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 8''' — The Wandering Titan attempted to cross a portal to attack Moongrave.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 12''' — Everyone is preparing to face the Wandering Titan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 12''' — The Wandering Titan is on its way to Moongrave.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 13''' — The Wandering Titan is a reference for strength.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 15''' — The Wandering Titan is a Dreadgod that cannot attack minds.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 15''' — The Wandering Titan has a serpentine tail.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 15''' — The Wandering Titan can breathe gold dragon's breath.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 21''' — Blackflame City was evacuated before the Wandering Titan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 21''' — The Wandering Titan is a towering black statue with stone-like skin and shell.}}

== Waybound ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 3''' — Mercy has experience facing a weakened Wandering Titan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 4''' — One of the Paths of Heaven displays a symbol that reminds Lindon of the Wandering Titan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 10''' — Orthos wants to be able to fight the Wandering Titan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 11''' — Lindon's Dreadgod hand fed on the vitality and blood essence of the Wandering Titan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 14''' — The Wandering Titan can blink through space.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 15''' — The Wandering Titan is an echo of hunger madra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 21''' — The Wandering Titan swapped places with the Silent King.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 21''' — The Wandering Titan can be made into a hammer.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 24''' — The Wandering Titan has one colossal eye.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 27''' — The Wandering Titan uses its tail to catch its balance.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 27''' — The Wandering Titan uses a Striker technique.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 28''' — The Wandering Titan's tail cracked into Lindon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 28''' — The Wandering Titan uses a punch that can provide momentum.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 30''' — The Wandering Titan is clashing with the Ghost.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 30''' — The Wandering Titan caught dragon's breath on its shell.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 33''' — Lindon has not yet received the Wandering Titan's corpse.}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 1''' — The Wandering Titan fought against Monarchs.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 7''' — Lindon has three shells hewn from the Wandering Titan orbiting his body.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 14''' — The Wandering Titan stepped through a portal to trade places with the Silent King.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
